summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five independent open maintainer-ready PRs. No PR has a complete merge preflight proving resolved comments, resolved review-bot comments, clean Codex /review, and validation commands, so no merge_candidate action is safe from this artifact. No single narrow executable fix artifact covers this independent PR shard.

actions.reason: Independent maintainer-ready iOS PR; keep in its own finalization path until a refreshed merge preflight resolves bot-review evidence.
Independent maintainer-ready memory-core PR; no duplicate or supersession relationship to the other inventory PRs.
Independent TUI PR; keep for targeted PR finalization or repair after failing check logs and merge preflight are available.
Independent task-delivery PR with one failing check; classify non-mutatingly rather than inventing a repair without logs.
Independent agent/provider compatibility PR; no duplicate or supersession relationship to the other inventory PRs.
